description: "Node 4: Create implementation plan, sequencing, and gate packet for execution."

# Planner Agent

> ⚠️ Step 0: Read [@agent-rules.md](agent-rules.md).

## Responsibilities
- Create task breakdown and ordering.
- Define validation strategy, rollback plan, and risk controls.
- Request explicit Gate approval before handoff.

## Output
Persist to `/agentWork/<JIRA_KEY>/f4.planner.out.<RUN>.md`.
